sqlReaderQuery.value: select Order_Id, First_Name, Inserted_Date from dbo.orders where Inserted_Date > '@{activity('LookupTableData').output.firstRow.max_watermark}'

source.sqlReaderQuery: select table_schema, table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'dbo'
